description.en: Manage repositories, issues, pull requests, and code search
description.zh: 管理仓库、Issue、Pull Request 和代码搜索

auth_instructions.en: Go to GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → 生成新 Token

description.en: Manage projects, merge requests, and CI/CD pipelines
description.zh: 管理项目、合并请求和 CI/CD 流水线

auth_instructions.en: Go to GitLab → Preferences → Access Tokens → Create personal access token
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 GitLab → Preferences → Access Tokens → 创建个人访问令牌

description.en: Project management — issues, projects, and cycles
description.zh: 项目管理 — Issue、项目和迭代周期

auth_instructions.en: Go to Linear → Settings → API → Create personal API key
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Linear → Settings → API → 创建个人 API Key

description.en: Error tracking and performance monitoring
description.zh: 错误追踪和性能监控

auth_instructions.en: Go to Sentry → Settings → Auth Tokens → Create new token
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Sentry → Settings → Auth Tokens → 创建新令牌

description.en: Query databases, browse schemas, and manage tables
description.zh: 查询数据库、浏览 Schema 和管理表

auth_instructions.en: Deploy the PostgreSQL MCP server with your connection string
auth_instructions.zh: 使用连接字符串部署 PostgreSQL MCP 服务器

description.en: Query databases, browse schemas, and manage tables
description.zh: 查询数据库、浏览 Schema 和管理表

auth_instructions.en: Deploy the MySQL MCP server with your connection string
auth_instructions.zh: 使用连接字符串部署 MySQL MCP 服务器

description.en: Key-value operations, pub/sub, and data inspection
description.zh: 键值操作、发布订阅和数据检查

auth_instructions.en: Deploy the Redis MCP server pointing to your Redis instance
auth_instructions.zh: 部署 Redis MCP 服务器并指向你的 Redis 实例

description.en: Document operations, aggregation, and collection management
description.zh: 文档操作、聚合查询和集合管理

auth_instructions.en: Deploy the MongoDB MCP server with your connection URI
auth_instructions.zh: 使用连接 URI 部署 MongoDB MCP 服务器

description.en: Send messages, manage channels, and search workspace
description.zh: 发送消息、管理频道和搜索工作区

auth_instructions.en: Go to Slack → Apps → Create App → OAuth & Permissions → Install to workspace → Copy bot token. Deploy locally: npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcp-server-slack
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Slack → Apps → 创建应用 → OAuth & Permissions → 安装到工作区 → 复制 Bot Token。本地部署：npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcp-server-slack

description.en: Send messages, manage channels, and moderate servers
description.zh: 发送消息、管理频道和服务器管理

auth_instructions.en: Go to Discord Developer Portal → Applications → Bot → Copy token
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Discord 开发者门户 → 应用 → Bot → 复制 Token

description.en: Manage S3 buckets, Lambda functions, EC2 instances, and more
description.zh: 管理 S3 存储桶、Lambda 函数、EC2 实例等

auth_instructions.en: Configure with AWS Access Key ID and Secret Access Key
auth_instructions.zh: 使用 AWS Access Key ID 和 Secret Access Key 配置

description.en: Manage DNS records, Workers, and edge configuration
description.zh: 管理 DNS 记录、Workers 和边缘配置

auth_instructions.en: Go to Cloudflare → My Profile → API Tokens → Create Token
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Cloudflare → 我的个人资料 → API 令牌 → 创建令牌

description.en: Read and write local files, browse directories
description.zh: 读写本地文件、浏览目录

auth_instructions.en: Deploy locally — grants access to the configured directory
auth_instructions.zh: 本地部署 — 授权访问指定目录

description.en: Search the web and fetch page content
description.zh: 搜索网页并获取页面内容

auth_instructions.en: Requires a search API key (Google, Bing, or Brave)
auth_instructions.zh: 需要搜索 API Key（Google、Bing 或 Brave）

description.en: Browser automation — navigate, screenshot, and extract data
description.zh: 浏览器自动化 — 导航、截图和数据提取

auth_instructions.en: Deploy the Puppeteer MCP server with a headless Chrome instance
auth_instructions.zh: 部署带无头 Chrome 的 Puppeteer MCP 服务器

description.en: Search and browse Microsoft Learn documentation (Azure, .NET, Office, etc.)
description.zh: 搜索和浏览微软文档（Azure、.NET、Office 等）

description.en: Search and browse AWS service documentation
description.zh: 搜索和浏览 AWS 服务文档

description.en: Search MDN for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Web API references
description.zh: 搜索 MDN 的 HTML、CSS、JavaScript 和 Web API 参考文档

description.en: Search and read Wikipedia articles in any language
description.zh: 搜索和阅读任意语言的维基百科文章

description.en: Search and read academic papers from arXiv
description.zh: 搜索和阅读 arXiv 学术论文

description.en: Read and write Notion pages, databases, and blocks
description.zh: 读写 Notion 页面、数据库和区块

auth_instructions.en: Go to Notion → Settings → My connections → Develop or manage integrations → Create new integration
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Notion → Settings → My connections → 开发或管理集成 → 创建新集成

description.en: Search, read, and manage files in Google Drive
description.zh: 搜索、读取和管理 Google Drive 文件

auth_instructions.en: Create a Google Cloud OAuth2 credential and authorize Drive access
auth_instructions.zh: 创建 Google Cloud OAuth2 凭证并授权 Drive 访问

description.en: Manage Jira issues, sprints, and project boards
description.zh: 管理 Jira Issue、Sprint 和项目面板

auth_instructions.en: Go to Atlassian → Account settings → Security → API tokens → Create API token
auth_instructions.zh: 前往 Atlassian → 账户设置 → 安全 → API 令牌 → 创建 API 令牌
